instructions.reason_for_call: You want to return the bookshelf and jigsaw you received in the same order. Make sure you mention at the beginning that you want to cancel these two things, and they are from the same order. You also want to return the backpack you received with the vacuum cleaner. You also want to change your pending order address to the default Chicago one, and change its item color to red. You want to get the tracking number of your cancelled order.
instructions.known_info: You name is Lucas Brown and your email is lucas.brown9344@example.com.
instructions.task_instructions: You are busy, happy, outgoing, messy, optimistic. You like to say one thing at a time.

nl_assertions: Agent should provide the tracking number 286422338955.

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Calculate the result of a mathematical expression.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to calculate, such as '2 + 2'. The expression can contain numbers, operators (+, -, *, /), parentheses, and spaces.
expression.title: Expression

tools.name: cancel_pending_order
tools.description:
Cancel a pending order. If the order is already processed or delivered,

it cannot be cancelled. The agent needs to explain the cancellation detail
and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed. If the user confirms,
the order status will be changed to 'cancelled' and the payment will be refunded.
The refund will be added to the user's gift card balance immediately if the payment
was made using a gift card, otherwise the refund would take 5-7 business days to process.
The function returns the order details after the cancellation.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

reason.description: The reason for cancellation, which should be either 'no longer needed' or 'ordered by mistake'.
reason.title: Reason

tools.name: exchange_delivered_order_items
tools.description:
Exchange items in a delivered order to new items of the same product type.

For a delivered order, return or exchange can be only done once by the agent.
The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be exchanged, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

new_item_ids.description:
The item ids to be exchanged for, each such as '1008292230'.
There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id
in the same position and be of the same product.
new_item_ids.title: New Item Ids

payment_method_id.description:
The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference,
such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up
from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: find_user_id_by_name_zip
tools.description:
Find user id by first name, last name, and zip code. If the user is not found, the function

will return an error message. By default, find user id by email, and only call this function
if the user is not found by email or cannot remember email.

first_name.description: The first name of the customer, such as 'John'.
first_name.title: First Name

last_name.description: The last name of the customer, such as 'Doe'.
last_name.title: Last Name

zip.description: The zip code of the customer, such as '12345'.
zip.title: Zip

tools.name: find_user_id_by_email
tools.description: Find user id by email. If the user is not found, the function will return an error message.

email.description: The email of the user, such as 'something@example.com'.
email.title: Email

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: Get the status and details of an order.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get the inventory details of a product.

product_id.description: The product id, such as '6086499569'. Be careful the product id is different from the item id.
product_id.title: Product Id

tools.name: get_item_details
tools.description: Get the inventory details of an item.

item_id.description: The item id, such as '6086499569'. Be careful the item id is different from the product id.
item_id.title: Item Id

tools.name: get_user_details
tools.description: Get the details of a user, including their orders.

tools.name: list_all_product_types
tools.description:
List the name and product id of all product types.

Each product type has a variety of different items with unique item ids and options.
There are only 50 product types in the store.

tools.name: modify_pending_order_address
tools.description: Modify the shipping address of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

address1.description: The first line of the address, such as '123 Main St'.
address1.title: Address1

address2.description: The second line of the address, such as 'Apt 1' or ''.
address2.title: Address2

tools.name: modify_pending_order_items
tools.description: Modify items in a pending order to new items of the same product type. For a pending order, this function can only be called once. The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

new_item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified for, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id in the same position and be of the same product.
new_item_ids.title: New Item Ids

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.description: Modify the payment method of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.title: Order Id

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.

tools.name: return_delivered_order_items
tools.description:
Return some items of a delivered order.

The order status will be changed to 'return requested'.
The agent needs to explain the return detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.
The user will receive follow-up email for how and where to return the item.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be returned, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'.
These can be looked up from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: transfer_to_human_agents
tools.description:
Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue.

Only transfer if
 -  the user explicitly asks for a human agent
 -  given the policy and the available tools, you cannot solve the user's issue.

summary.description: A summary of the user's issue.
summary.title: Summary

instructions.reason_for_call: You just won a lottery, and you want to upgrade all your items to the most expensive variants (the new variants can have different features from the originals, but make sure the new shoe is still the same size). You only care about the size; the other specs are not important for the shoe or any other item. If for a given order the agent tells you that the upgrade is not possible, tell it to proceed with the next order and forget about this one. You want to pay the difference with your Giftcard. If the agent says giftcard is not possible, using PayPal is fine.
instructions.known_info: You are Ethan Garcia, and you live in Denver, 80280.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not remember your email address
instructions.task_instructions: You are a mysterious person and do not want to reveal much about yourself.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to exchange your Bicycle for one with a larger frame size for your kid (you are okay with having a mountain bike instead of a road bike). Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged, you want the same difficulty, but 1000 more pieces, and you prefer animal than art theme if both are available. Make sure you mention these at the same time.  You also want to exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution, without changing the other options. If the agent asks for confirmation, mention that you'd prefer the other card as payment or refund method. Lastly, you want to cancel the skateboard in your other order.
instructions.known_info: You name is Sofia Li and your zip code is 78260.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not remember your email address
instructions.task_instructions: You are outgoing, organized, cautious, pessimistic.   If you cannot cancel one single item, you are okay with cancelling the whole order, with the reason of no longer needed.

email.description: The email of the user, such as 'something@example.com'.
email.title: Email

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: Get the status and details of an order.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get the inventory details of a product.

product_id.description: The product id, such as '6086499569'. Be careful the product id is different from the item id.
product_id.title: Product Id

tools.name: get_item_details
tools.description: Get the inventory details of an item.

item_id.description: The item id, such as '6086499569'. Be careful the item id is different from the product id.
item_id.title: Item Id

tools.name: get_user_details
tools.description: Get the details of a user, including their orders.

tools.name: list_all_product_types
tools.description:
List the name and product id of all product types.

Each product type has a variety of different items with unique item ids and options.
There are only 50 product types in the store.

tools.name: modify_pending_order_address
tools.description: Modify the shipping address of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

address1.description: The first line of the address, such as '123 Main St'.
address1.title: Address1

address2.description: The second line of the address, such as 'Apt 1' or ''.
address2.title: Address2

tools.name: modify_pending_order_items
tools.description: Modify items in a pending order to new items of the same product type. For a pending order, this function can only be called once. The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

new_item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified for, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id in the same position and be of the same product.
new_item_ids.title: New Item Ids

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: modify_pending_order_payment
tools.description: Modify the payment method of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: modify_user_address
tools.description: Modify the default address of a user. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

address1.description: The first line of the address, such as '123 Main St'.
address1.title: Address1

address2.description: The second line of the address, such as 'Apt 1' or ''.
address2.title: Address2

tools.name: return_delivered_order_items
tools.description:
Return some items of a delivered order.

The order status will be changed to 'return requested'.
The agent needs to explain the return detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.
The user will receive follow-up email for how and where to return the item.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be returned, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

payment_method_id.description:
The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'.
These can be looked up from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: transfer_to_human_agents
tools.description:
Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue.

Only transfer if
 -  the user explicitly asks for a human agent
 -  given the policy and the available tools, you cannot solve the user's issue.

summary.description: A summary of the user's issue.
summary.title: Summary

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to change your wireless earbuds in order W5061109 to a blue colored one. Provide all details upfront and ask the agent to resolve as soon as possible. You want the price to be the same or lower.
instructions.known_info: You are Chen Johnson from Houston TX, 77004.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not remember your email address

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Calculate the result of a mathematical expression.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to calculate, such as '2 + 2'. The expression can contain numbers, operators (+, -, *, /), parentheses, and spaces.
expression.title: Expression

tools.name: cancel_pending_order
tools.description:
Cancel a pending order. If the order is already processed or delivered,

it cannot be cancelled. The agent needs to explain the cancellation detail
and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed. If the user confirms,
the order status will be changed to 'cancelled' and the payment will be refunded.
The refund will be added to the user's gift card balance immediately if the payment
was made using a gift card, otherwise the refund would take 5-7 business days to process.
The function returns the order details after the cancellation.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

reason.description: The reason for cancellation, which should be either 'no longer needed' or 'ordered by mistake'.
reason.title: Reason

tools.name: exchange_delivered_order_items
tools.description:
Exchange items in a delivered order to new items of the same product type.

For a delivered order, return or exchange can be only done once by the agent.
The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.
order_id.title: Order Id

item_ids.description: The item ids to be exchanged, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.
item_ids.title: Item Ids

new_item_ids.description:
The item ids to be exchanged for, each such as '1008292230'.
There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id
in the same position and be of the same product.
new_item_ids.title: New Item Ids

payment_method_id.description:
The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference,
such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up
from the user or order details.
payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id

tools.name: find_user_id_by_name_zip
tools.description:
Find user id by first name, last name, and zip code. If the user is not found, the function

will return an error message. By default, find user id by email, and only call this function
if the user is not found by email or cannot remember email.

first_name.description: The first name of the customer, such as 'John'.
first_name.title: First Name

last_name.description: The last name of the customer, such as 'Doe'.
last_name.title: Last Name

zip.description: The zip code of the customer, such as '12345'.
zip.title: Zip

tools.name: find_user_id_by_email
tools.description: Find user id by email. If the user is not found, the function will return an error message.

email.description: The email of the user, such as 'something@example.com'.
email.title: Email
